transcript.text:
[This audio over here]
[Is her sushi order]
Just 1 sec
[This will never end]
[Let's hurry]
[Packed]
[3 times bigger]
[3 times delicious]
[What is that?]
[In 1 bite?!]
[Clear them all]
Hello everyone
I'm on my way to the countryside
And craved some sushi
I kept thinking about the salmon I had recently
There's a gigantic sized salmon sushi place here

It's going to be great
[Cheonan Sinbu-dong] [Sushi-rin]
Sushi 3 times thicker
Hello
Is this the menu?
That's a lot of items
I was going to order everything on the menu, but I can't anymore
[But managed to find what she wanted]
I see donkatsu (pork cutlet) I want that too
Actually, I want everything What do I do?
Whatever let's just order
I'm ready to order
[Alrighty]
1 Rin-Special sushi, 2 jumbo salmon sushi
[1 sec...]
4 Tofu sushi

What's salmon aburi?
Cooked salmon
Then 2 of salmon aburi
5 orders of fins
[Let her be]
[5 salmon belly, 5 soy sauce prawn, 5 aged kimchi flounder
[Okay make her stop]
What is seasoned kimchi flounder?
The aged kimchi works as a topping
2 of those then
[4 salmon belly, 5 brisket sushi]
[5 beef sushi, 5 tuna sushi]
[Playing the Dictation game?]
[How many did I order?]
66 orders
That might not be enough

Well, I'll take those for now
Thank you
Should I order more? That's not going to be enough
Can I add 2 egg sushi?
Also 2 eel sushi
[How many is that..?]
Let's tie the hair
[Long receipt]
[Are ya'll ready?]
[I think so..!]
[Okay let's go]
[Let's make the jumbo-sized salmon sushi]
[Jumbo Salmon Sushi]
[Beef sushi]
[Glossy]
[Some sesame seeds]

[Sushi is complete]
[On a cart]
[Something he's never seen before]
Looks good
Thank you
It's all here
[Good job team]
Thank you
[Even the miso soup]
It comes with Udon and Tempura, but I have no space here They'll bring them out later
Bon appetit
Looks so good The colors are amazing
Let's start with the Jumbo Salmon sushi
It looks really good
It's like 3 times bigger than a normal sushi
Here's a regular one

4 times?
Look at the amount of rice
Oh no!
No.. my rice
I dropped some
But I still have a lot
It's so good Amazing
A mouthful of salmon
[Did she eat that in 1 bite?]
Really tasty
[Go away]
Let's compare it with the regular salmon sushi
I thought it was a lot of rice
But it's really not overwhelming
It's the right amount
I've figured out why I felt that way

It's a lot of rice, but
The fish is as thick, so it's perfect
What next?
Egg sushi
If the egg sushi is good, their sushi is good
Yummy
Beef sushi Gotta eat it while it's warm
I need a spoon
Beef is always delicious
The salmon belly fat sushi is really thick It's delicious
Their salmon is the best
Aged kimchi I've never seen this
I've seen white kimchi, but not red
I think aged kimchi goes well with this
It's a great palate cleanser
Aged kimchi flounder sushi this time

I love this Fin
Flounder fins
It has a crunchy texture
That texture
This!
I had this recently
This is the salmon belly
Belly fat is really fatty
The belly itself has a great texture
It's really unique
To describe the taste,
the texture is just like the fins
and as fatty as the salmon meat
The crunchiness is everything
Very savory
You must try it if you are a fan of flounder fins and salmon belly fat

It's amazing
This goes with the salmon sushi
[How did she fit that in her mouth?]
Eel sushi is going to be great
It's on the drier side
[Who got you smiling like that?]
There's 1 I didn't try yet
Tofu sushi
I really like the tofu sushi (fried-tofu layer)
That tastes really good
I should've ordered more
Cooked salmon this time
The inside is still raw, but the outside is cooked
Amazing
Jumbo salmon sushi
It feels like I just ate 4 pieces of sushi

1 more
Look at the size I think it's way too big
There's no way
[Is she really going to eat all of that?]
[Some fins now]
[Another one]
That's hot
Flounder sushi
I didn't try it yet
What next?
Salmon
It's so good I think it's the best
[How many is that?]
60 regular sushi orders
The jumbo sushi is about 3 times bigger than the regular ones
like 3 to 4 times bigger

So a total of 100 orders of sushi
100 is not that much
[What did she just say?...]
Let's eat the rice first
[No more miso soup!]
Get her some more
Thank you
I can't eat it yet
I need to eat it with the soup
Thank you
You're on the TV show "Hometown Report", right?
Yes I am
My mom and dad love you Really?
You're popular amongst the elders Really? That's awesome
Thank you
I ate the rice off of this

Look at this
That size
[Too much]
[Chew]
So big
Eel
1 of each left
Only this much left already
[Udon and Tempura are here] Thank you
Yes, thank you
I need to apply for workers' compensation because of you
[Cleaning up the table really quick]
Udon looks so good
I think I can finish this in 1 bite
So warm
Tempura here

Shrimp and sweet pumpkin
It's really crispy Yum
The pumpkin just melts It's not hard
1 last piece!
My favorite: salmon belly
[The owner is here]
You finished all of that
It wasn't that much
This guy's wrist is hurting Really? Oh no!
Oh what?!
[A gift from a fan]
[Thank you]
[Counting how many she ate]
She's amazing
Incredible
I was impressed to see her eat on YouTube

It's even more amazing in person
I was astonished
Eating sushi is always great It was a great meal
Jumbo salmon sushi is great, but
I wonder if they'll come up with Jumbo tuna sushi
Anyways, thanks everyone! [Subtitles by Hyun Choi] [antharoni@gmail.com]
